ideation: This sequence mimics the action of picking up a file folder.  The animation will focus on the left arm, as if the robot is retrieving the folder. The right arm will remain mostly still for balance. Frame 1 shows both arms relaxed. Frame 2 shows the left arm reaching forward. Frame 3 shows the left arm grasping the folder, bending at the shoulder. Frame 4 shows the left arm bringing the folder closer to the robot's body. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to rest. The slight variations in wrist angles add realism.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to work
left arm extends forward to grasp
fingers close around the folder, pulling it in
left arm brings the folder closer, steadying
both arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
